info.title: Unified Messaging Gateway
info.description: Single point of contact for all messaging integrations. Abstracts WhatsApp, Telegram, Email, and SMS providers behind a unified API.

post.description: Receive inbound WhatsApp messages from external HTTP providers

connection.description: Live connection info for providers that manage their own connection (e.g. Baileys). Absent for API-key providers.

managed.description: Whether this provider uses managed connections

qr.description: QR code data string (render with a QR library to scan)

credentialsRef.description: Reference to credentials in env vars (optional if credentials is provided)

credentials.description: Inline credential string (e.g. "user:apiKey@host:port"). Stored in YAML, used when env vars are not available.

connection.description: Live connection info for providers that manage their own connection (e.g. Baileys). Absent for API-key providers.

managed.description: Whether this provider uses managed connections

qr.description: QR code data string (render with a QR library to scan)

get.description: Get details of a specific account, including live connection status and QR code for self-auth providers

managed.description: Whether this provider uses managed connections

qr.description: QR code data string (render with a QR library to scan)

connection.description: Live connection info for providers that manage their own connection (e.g. Baileys). Absent for API-key providers.

managed.description: Whether this provider uses managed connections

qr.description: QR code data string (render with a QR library to scan)

get.description: Check the connection status of a specific account

post.description: Start the connection process for a self-auth provider (e.g. Baileys). After calling this, poll GET /api/v1/accounts/:id to retrieve the QR code.

connection.description: Live connection info for providers that manage their own connection (e.g. Baileys). Absent for API-key providers.

managed.description: Whether this provider uses managed connections

qr.description: QR code data string (render with a QR library to scan)

post.description: Request a pairing code for authentication. Enter this code in WhatsApp > Linked Devices > Link with phone number.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number with country code (e.g. "+34600000001"). If omitted, uses the number from account identity.

pairingCode.description: Enter this code in the messaging app to link

post.description: Disconnect a self-auth provider account and clear its session
Send a message through a specific account or via routing rules

routing.description: Routing criteria (used if "from" is not provided)

to.description: Recipient identifier (phone number, email, chat ID, etc.)

content.body: Alerta: nuevo DEA registrado en tu zona

get.description: Get the delivery status of a sent message

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID that sent the message

accountId.description: Account ID that received the message

get.description: List all webhook configurations across all accounts
List all webhook configurations for a specific account

post.description: Add a new webhook to an account. Multiple webhooks per account are supported.

events.description: Event types to forward. Defaults to ["*"]

enabled.description: Whether this webhook is active. Defaults to true

delete.description: Remove all webhook configurations for an account (falls back to global webhook)

events.description: Event types to forward. Defaults to ["*"]

enabled.description: Whether this webhook is active. Defaults to true

get.description: List all groups for a connected account
Get detailed info for a specific group including participants
